task: Change Ledger.Amounts() and Ledger.Total() in store/store.go to return whole dollars (cents divided by 100, rounded toward zero) instead of cents. Entries() must keep returning cents.
Change util.Clamp in util/clamp.go so that hi is exclusive: values must be limited to the range [lo, hi-1] instead of [lo, hi].
Make ids.Counter in ids/ids.go zero-based: the first call to Next() must return 0, the second 1, and so on.
Change Ledger.Amounts() in store/store.go to return the amounts sorted in ascending order. Entries() must keep returning insertion order.
